claims.quote: At Northwell Health, we train more current and future physicians than almost any other health system in the U.S., educating more than 2,000 residents and fellows each year.

claims.limitations: Only program rows literally naming 'Staten Island University Hospital' can be attributed to the SIUH campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: System-level GME content; Tier 2.

claims.quote: Externships, Fellowships and Nurse Residency Programs

claims.quote: the Division of General Pediatrics partners with local environmental health organizations, trains pediatrics residents in environmental health, and develops new environmental health projects
claims.claimText: Division of General Pediatrics at Cohen Children's trains pediatrics residents in environmental health.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Mentions training of pediatrics residents — Tier 2 GME-adjacent signal, not pre-residency USCE.
claims.limitations: Statement is about Cohen Children's (Queens), not Staten Island University Hospital — possible scope conflict with named institution.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Office of Academic AffairsThis department facilitates program accreditation as well as recruitment and onboarding for residents and fellows.
claims.claimText: Northwell Office of Academic Affairs handles GME program accreditation, recruitment, and onboarding of residents and fellows.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Operational GME office supporting residents/fellows; Tier 2 infrastructure signal.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on the program list and headline counts; missed the Office of Academic Affairs section block describing its function.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Application processBenefits & compensationResident & fellow lifeTraining enhancementAcademic affairs

claims.limitations: Navigation labels only; no substantive content captured on this page.

claims.quote: As the largest health system in New York —with expanded access to our exceptional care in Connecticut— we’re proud to educate residents and fellows, passing along the unmatched expertise that only Northwell can offer.
claims.claimText: Northwell describes itself as the largest NY health system with expanded CT access, training residents and fellows across that footprint.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes geographic footprint of GME training network; Tier 2.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the 2,000-resident and 220-program sentences but not the NY/CT footprint sentence between them.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only
